profileDescription.generic: Shelf packing with tight sizing and portable defaults for general game atlas exports.
profileDescription.unity: MaxRects with power-of-two sizing, cache, trim, extrude, and rotate for Unity runtime loading.
profileDescription.monogame: MaxRects with power-of-two sizing and cache; rotation stays off by default for simpler custom draw paths.
